name: ChatGPT
description: AI chatbot by OpenAI for conversation, writing, coding, brainstorming, and more. One of the most popular AI tools worldwide.

name: Claude
description: Anthropic's AI assistant excelling at analysis, writing, coding, and thoughtful conversation with strong safety focus.

name: Gemini
description: Google's multimodal AI assistant for text, image understanding, coding, and research with Google ecosystem integration.

name: Perplexity AI
description: AI-powered search engine that provides direct answers with cited sources. Great for research and fact-checking.

name: Poe
description: Platform by Quora offering access to multiple AI models including GPT-4, Claude, and custom bots in one interface.

name: DALL-E 3
description: OpenAI's image generation model creating detailed images from text prompts. Available through ChatGPT and API.

name: Stable Diffusion
description: Open-source image generation model you can run locally or use via web interfaces. Highly customizable with LoRA models.

description: AI image generation platform with fine-tuned models for game assets, concept art, and creative imagery.

name: Ideogram

name: Midjourney
description: Premium AI art generator known for stunning artistic quality. Creates beautiful illustrations, photos, and concept art.

name: GitHub Copilot
description: AI pair programmer that suggests code completions, entire functions, and helps debug. Integrates with VS Code and JetBrains.

name: Cursor
description: AI-first code editor built on VS Code with intelligent autocomplete, chat, and codebase-aware assistance.

name: Sourcegraph Cody
description: AI coding assistant with full codebase context. Answers questions, generates code, and explains complex code.

name: Tabnine
description: AI code completion tool supporting multiple languages and IDEs. Runs locally for privacy-conscious developers.

name: Replit AI
description: AI-powered coding platform with instant deployment. Code, collaborate, and ship apps directly in the browser.

name: Copy.ai
description: AI writing tool for marketing copy, blog posts, social media content, and email campaigns. Templates for every use case.

name: Writesonic

name: QuillBot

name: Rytr
description: Affordable AI writing assistant for blog posts, emails, and creative content. Supports 30+ languages.

name: Runway
description: AI video generation and editing suite. Create videos from text, images, or edit existing footage with AI tools.

name: Pika
description: AI video creation platform that generates and edits videos from text and image prompts with cinematic quality.

name: HeyGen
description: AI video creation platform for talking avatar videos. Great for marketing, training, and personalized video messages.

name: ElevenLabs
description: AI voice generation and cloning platform. Create natural-sounding speech in multiple languages and voices.

description: AI voice generator for voiceovers, presentations, and e-learning content with 120+ natural voices.

name: Suno

name: AIVA

name: Notion AI
description: AI assistant integrated into Notion for writing, summarizing, brainstorming, and organizing your workspace.

name: Gamma

description: AI-powered academic search engine that finds and summarizes scientific research with evidence-based answers.
